headshots.label: Confident
headshots.description: Confident, professional, direct gaze with folded arms for authority-led thumbnails.

headshots.label: Disappointed
headshots.description: Disappointed, critical, unimpressed reaction for warning-led or problem-led hooks.

headshots.label: Pointing
headshots.description: Pointing pose that naturally directs attention toward text, arrows, or the other side of a contrast.

headshots.label: Shocked
headshots.description: Wide-eyed hands-on-head shock for dramatic reveals and strong problem framing.

headshots.label: Surprised
headshots.description: Surprised hand-over-mouth reaction for curiosity-heavy or verdict-driven thumbnails.

headshots.label: Complete Shock
headshots.description: Full-body extreme shock pose that works when the thumbnail needs maximum emotional intensity.
